title: 01.07.2024 İngilizce Yeterlik Sınavı (DÜİYES) Önemli Bilgilendirme

st

, 2024, English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program 2023-2024 Academic Year Spring Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

The 2023-2024 Spring Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on Monday, July 1st, and invigilated face-to-face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions, and students are required to attend both sessions.

The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 10.00 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You need to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

DÜİYES results will be announced on July 5

th

.
